commands.review_summary:
The PR updates AWS EC2 Mac Dedicated Host selection, launch retry, stale-host orphan-sweep release behavior, docs/config, and focused Worker tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live AWS reproduction was run during this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main lacks capacity-aware Mac host selection, and the PR adds focused mocked tests for the reported InsufficientCapacityOnHost and stale pending-host paths.
